heading: Ballarat Central vs Ballarat East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ballarat Central, Victoria and Ballarat East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ballarat East has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Ballarat Central (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ballarat Central or Ballarat East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ballarat Central has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Ballarat East scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ballarat Central scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Ballarat East scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ballarat Central or Ballarat East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ballarat East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
